_comment: Top 3 projects display on homepage (ProjectsSection). All 5 show on /projects page. Projects also show in archive with filtering and detail views.

projects.name: Mew-Claw
projects.desc: AI Agent Controlled from Telegram directly
projects.descriptor: Telegram AI agent with dynamic tool routing and human-in-the-loop safety
projects.overview: A Telegram-based AI agent capable of translating natural-language requests into executable actions through dynamic tool routing and workflow orchestration. Integrates file operations, code editing, terminal execution, web search, and social media publishing workflows into a unified tool-calling framework for autonomous task execution. Features a human-in-the-loop approval mechanism to safeguard sensitive operations, ensuring explicit user consent before executing terminal commands or external actions.

projects.name: dbSmash
projects.desc: Conversational AI CLI npm to generate and initialise db schmeas and spin up Db
projects.descriptor: Conversational AI CLI npm to generate and initialise db schmeas and spin up Db
projects.overview: An AI-powered CLI package on npm that lets you describe your app idea in plain English and iteratively design production-ready database schemas through a conversational interface. Visualize schemas as Mermaid diagrams, critique and suggest changes to the AI, and lock in your design before being prompted to choose your database engine (MongoDB, Firestore, or Supabase). Finally generates model definitions, seeding scripts, and initializes the database — all from a single conversation.

projects.name: Shraddha Media
projects.descriptor: News CMS with JWT auth, Redis OTP, RBAC & SEO management
projects.overview: Developed a production-ready news CMS with role-based access control, secure authentication, and content management workflows. Built JWT-based authentication with Redis-backed OTP verification delivered via Nodemailer, enabling secure account access and time-bound email verification. Automated sitemap generation and SEO metadata management, improving discoverability of 100+ published news articles.

projects.name: HookLens
projects.descriptor: Webhook capture & mimic engine with npm middleware
projects.overview: HookLens captures incoming webhooks via an npm middleware attached to your route, stores them in Supabase, and lets you auto-mimic them to your backend from a dashboard — no need to manually recreate events, payments, or messages. Uses Groq API to understand any webhook type and answer questions about the payload. From the dashboard, add your backend webhook URL and HookLens automatically forwards the exact same webhook to your endpoint.

projects.name: Smart Voter System
projects.descriptor: Group project — owned the full-stack web portal: React + Node.js + MySQL
projects.overview: A group project that eliminates manual labour inside polling booths by replacing long verification queues with RFID cards and fingerprint 2FA. Each voter receives an RFID card (instead of a voter card), taps it at the booth for identity verification, validates via the R305 fingerprint scanner for 2FA, and casts their vote — removing all in-between manual checking. I owned the complete web portal (React frontend + Node.js/MySQL backend) with real-time dashboard integration to the ESP32 hardware via long polling.
